{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603212253058AAEF5514E74BCA1E684"}"},"total":45},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7601804017574724414","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的挺好的，有逻辑，再布局和发展上，就是进入剧情上不算严谨，但也是符合电影世界的戏剧性，不是一味的求改变，在弱小时紧跟剧情，后续应该会有改变和避免悲剧。总体来说精品。期待后续发展"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769936690,"group_id":"7591298719245405246","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5R24K4yRoVzZdEC6cpO7Do=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"94656564059","user_name":"爱吃瘦肉木耳汤的凌虚"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"94656564059","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1758196351,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7591298719245405246","book_info":{"abstract":"低头刷个手机功夫的林恩被突如其来的大运天尊送到了影综世界。
为了活下去而随船出海当渔民的林恩竟然从海里捞上来了人。
看着杰森伯恩那熟悉的样貌，惊喜交加的林恩激活了“二维拓印系统”。
从拓印杰森伯恩的顶级特工能力到杀手47的基因改造体质，
林恩从战五渣变成了“擎天柱”，
当林恩从十字架身上拓印了传奇杀手的“肾上腺素控制”天赋后，
看着准备毁灭世界的脑残反派
林恩：别急，等我突破一下人体极限，然后会让你知道什么是真正的爱与和平。。。
如果这都不能让你体会到爱与和平，那就只能让我的朋友们一起给你聊聊天了
看着林恩身后走出来的杰森·伯恩、杀手47、约翰·威克、十字架和韦斯利父子、狐狸、史密斯夫妇、传奇狙击手鲍勃·李·斯瓦格、伸冤人麦考尔、机械师亚瑟、天龙特攻队、唐老大和他的家人们等等等等
反派终于留下了感动的泪水。。。。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2obed87bce153ec232ccccf445e5a46e1e~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"爱吃油焗红蟳的何玲碧","author_id":"","book_id":"7591298719245405246","book_name":"影综：捕鱼捕到了杰森伯恩","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#384040","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1016,"name":"男频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016&name=男频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":71,"name":"诸天万界","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=71&name=诸天万界&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1058,"name":"综影视","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1058&name=综影视&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7591524324574495256","read_count":"13099","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"676083"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.1","serial_count":"156","tags":"男频衍生,衍生,同人,穿越,系统,综影视,诸天万界","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2obed87bce153ec232ccccf445e5a46e1e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779288785&x-signature=ES49XSVVJCSa3QbjO7w0Zkfx4jw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"98420487804","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"25"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603212253058AAEF5514E74BCA1E684"}"
